Ignacio Pelayo, Defendants

Margo Seely, No. 301386; Andrea Pollock No. 301700, Daniel Navarro, No. 300802, and Ines Swaney No. 021969479

The Court hears testimony and reviews submitted group exhibits. Not marked

At the conclusion of the hearing the Court takes this matter under submission.
All exhibits are ordered returned
